relations.note: Defines the narrowly permitted image-free exception while preserving the base rule's fallback fill and all other styling.

quotes: A full-width banner where a **headline** and a **single button** are overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient image, both horizontally centered and stacked.
**Headline** → Brand Blue `#00529b`, centered, sitting in the **top third**, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px, one line.
**Button** → centered, in the **lower-middle** below the headline.

rules.intent: Preserve the explicit composition and hierarchy of the gradient callout.
rules.rule_text: The gradient callout is a full-content-width banner containing a headline and exactly one button over the branded gradient. Center both elements horizontally and stack them, with the headline in the top third and the button in the lower-middle below it.

quotes: **Background** → the gradient PNG, applied as the section background, sized `cover`, `no-repeat`, centered, spanning the full content width (600px). Always set a solid `background-color` of Sunshine `#faa31b` as fallback, since clients like Outlook drop background images.

**Background image:** asset is `https://solstice-public-forever.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/design_library/12912e15-c371-4bf0-a5b9-08a7f8c57d20/7772aba5-1ff5-4985-80bf-c15b782111a4/Gradient_callout.png` — do not re-host or recolor.
padding="48px 25px 56px 25px"

**Background** → the gradient PNG, applied as the section background, sized `cover`, `no-repeat`, centered, spanning the full content width (600px). Always set a solid `background-color` of Sunshine `#faa31b` as fallback, since clients like Outlook drop background images.

**Background image:** asset is `https://solstice-public-forever.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/design_library/12912e15-c371-4bf0-a5b9-08a7f8c57d20/7772aba5-1ff5-4985-80bf-c15b782111a4/Gradient_callout.png` — do not re-host or recolor.
padding="48px 25px 56px 25px"

rules.intent: Maintain the approved branded background while preserving rendering when email clients drop images.
rules.rule_text: Use the approved gradient image (gradient_callout.background.image = https://solstice-public-forever.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/design_library/12912e15-c371-4bf0-a5b9-08a7f8c57d20/7772aba5-1ff5-4985-80bf-c15b782111a4/Gradient_callout.png) without re-hosting or recoloring it. Render it centered, cover-sized, and nonrepeating across the 600px content width (gradient_callout.width = 600px), using gradient-callout padding (gradient_callout.padding = 48px 25px 56px 25px). Always retain Sunshine (color.primary.sunshine = #faa31b) as the solid fallback background.

quotes: The background may be skipped **only in very, very rare cases** (plain-text/AMP fallback, a client that strips all images, a hard size budget). When skipped, the section still renders on a solid Sunshine `#faa31b` fill and every other rule stays identical.

If the background must be skipped, remove only `background-url`, `background-size`, `background-repeat`, and `background-position` — keep `background-color="#faa31b"` and the headline color, button color, and button radius exactly as above.

rules.intent: Constrain image-free fallback behavior so the callout remains recognizably branded.
rules.rule_text: Skip the gradient background image only in very rare cases: a plain-text/AMP fallback, a client that strips all images, or a hard size budget. Remove only the background URL, size, repeat, and position properties; keep the Sunshine fallback (#faa31b), headline color, button color, button radius, and every other rule unchanged.

rules.intent: Maintain the approved headline hierarchy and legibility over the gradient.
rules.rule_text: Keep the gradient-callout headline centered and on one line. Use Brand Blue (gradient_callout.headline.color = #00529b), Nunito Sans (font.family.nunito_sans = Nunito Sans), weight 800 (weight.component.800 = 800), approximately 28px type with the illustrated 34px line height, and headline padding (gradient_callout.headline.padding = 0 0 32px 0).

quotes: Fill Deep Blue `#003D74`, white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px), with a Gold `#FFC20E` arrow `›` (24px) after two non-breaking spaces. Size 248 × 64px.

**Button radius (mandatory, never change):** `border-radius: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px;` — this four-value asymmetric radius is the signature shape and is **always required on every instance**, even when the background is skipped.
Never simplify it to a single value, swap the corners, or round the decimals.
Fill Deep Blue `#003D74`, white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px), with a Gold `#FFC20E` arrow `›` (24px) after two non-breaking spaces. Size 248 × 64px.

**Button radius (mandatory, never change):** `border-radius: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px;` — this four-value asymmetric radius is the signature shape and is **always required on every instance**, even when the background is skipped.
Never simplify it to a single value, swap the corners, or round the decimals.
keep `background-color="#faa31b"` and the headline color, button color, and button radius exactly as above.

rules.intent: Protect the gradient CTA's distinctive, mandatory signature treatment.
rules.rule_text: The gradient-callout button uses Deep Blue (gradient_callout.button.fill = #003D74), a white label (gradient_callout.button.label.color = #ffffff), Nunito Sans (font.family.nunito_sans = Nunito Sans), weight 800 (weight.component.800 = 800), and a Gold arrow (gradient_callout.button.arrow.color = #FFC20E) after two non-breaking spaces. Keep the button at 248 × 64px (dimension.component.gradient_callout_button = 248 × 64px). Every instance must retain the exact signature radius (gradient_callout.button.radius = 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px), including image-free fallbacks; never simplify it, swap its corners, or round its decimals.
